src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Add import for HttpStatus to support explicit status code setting in response.
Change return type from Double to CurrencyConversion to return the full object instead of just the factor.
Update response body to return the full CurrencyConversion object and set status explicitly.
Add logging statement to log the conversion factor value.
Remove the getDataFallBack method which is no longer needed.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Remove Spring Cloud Config client configuration block.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
cloud:
  config:
    discovery:
      enabled: true 
      service-id: config-server

eureka:
  client:
    serviceUrl:
      defaultZone: ${EUREKA_URI:http://localhost:8761/eureka}
    region: default
    registryFetchIntervalSeconds: 5
